stemHtml: Which of the following runway contaminants are given in a SNOWTAM?

options.a: Slush, ice, compacted snow, standing water.
options.b: Compacted snow, frozen ruts, slush, hailstones.
options.c: Powder snow, slush, ice, compacted snow, frozen ruts.
options.d: Frozen ruts, ice pellets, slush, wet snow, compacted snow.
